title: BlamblCraft
description: Modpack for playing on server BlamblCraft.
body:
This modpack is for playing on server called BlamblCraft.
This modpack features lots of optimization mods as well as QoL mods and some fun ones.
You are welcome to just download this pack even if you dont want to play on BlamblCraft server and only want to play singleplayer, that works too. Mods contained in this modpack changes from version to version simply because i find better ones to replace the old ones, or i find completely new ones. I also remove some that may not be updated anymore or just dont have support for new minecraft version yet.
